# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report security vulnerabilities to security@awren.ai. Do not create public issues for security vulnerabilities.

## Response Timeline

- Initial acknowledgment: 24 hours
- Investigation: Up to 7 days
- Fix deployment: Up to 14 days

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 0.1.x   | ✅        |
